2606.06468.title: Goedel-Architect: Streamlining Formal Theorem Proving with Blueprint Generation and Refinement
2606.06468.paper_summary: We introduce Goedel-Architect, an agentic framework for formal theorem proving in Lean 4 centered on blueprint generation and refinement. A blueprint is a dependency graph of definitions and lemmas that builds up to the main theorem. First, Goedel-Architect generates a blueprint of formally stated definitions and lemmas, along with declared dependencies. This blueprint is optionally guided by a natural language proof. Then, a tool-equipped Lean prover component closes each open lemma node in parallel using relevant dependencies. Failed lemmas in turn drive refinement of the global blueprint. This strategy contrasts with other mainstream approaches which use recursive lemma decomposition, and can inefficiently loop on dead-end strategies. Using the open-weight DeepSeek-V4-Flash (284B-A13B) as the backbone, Goedel-Architect attains 99.2% pass@1 on MiniF2F-test and 75.6% pass@1 on PutnamBench. With an optional natural-language proof seeding the initial blueprint on the harder problems, we additionally close the remaining two MiniF2F-test problems (reaching 100%), lift PutnamBench to 88.8% (597/672), and solve 4/6 on IMO 2025, 11/12 on Putnam 2025, and 3/6 on USAMO 2026. This represents state-of-the-art performance for an open-source pipeline at a price point up to 500x less than comparable open-source pipelines.
2606.06468.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 Goedel-Architect，一個以藍圖生成和精煉為中心的 Lean 4 正式定理證明的代理框架。<lb/>藍圖是定義和引理的依賴圖，構建出主要定理。<lb/>首先，Goedel-Architect 生成一個正式陳述的定義和引理的藍圖，以及已聲明的依賴關係。<lb/>這個藍圖可以選擇性地由自然語言證明指導。<lb/>然後，配備工具的 Lean 證明器組件並行地使用相關依賴關係關閉每個開放的引理節點。<lb/>失敗的引理反過來推動全局藍圖的精煉。<lb/>這一策略與其他主流方法形成對比，後者使用遞歸引理分解，並可能低效地在死胡同策略上循環。<lb/>使用開放權重的 DeepSeek-V4-Flash (284B-A13B) 作為骨幹，Goedel-Architect 在 MiniF2F-test 上達到 99.2% 的 pass@1，在 PutnamBench 上達到 75.6% 的 pass@1。<lb/>在更難的問題上，通過選擇性地使用自然語言證明來播種初始藍圖，我們還關閉了剩餘的兩個 MiniF2F-test 問題（達到 100%），將 PutnamBench 提升至 88.8%（597/672），並在 IMO 2025 上解決 4/6，在 Putnam 2025 上解決 11/12，在 USAMO 2026 上解決 3/6。<lb/>這代表了一個開源管道的最先進性能，其價格高達 500 倍低於可比較的開源管道。
2606.06468.author: Jui-Hui Chung et.al.
2606.06468.authors: Jui-Hui Chung, Ziyang Cai, Zihao Li, Qishuo Yin, Rohit Agarwal, Simon Park, Rodrigo Porto, Narutatsu Ri, Ziran Yang, Shange Tang, Xingyu Dang, Hongzhou Lin, Mengdi Wang, Danqi Chen, Chi Jin, Liam H Fowl, Sanjeev Arora
